item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Aww, I'd date 1-38.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
HAHAHAHA The inclusion of Manila, Philippines will get this article a:

+1!!!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Both great ideas.

If not in the entry itself, those could at least make a nice little tale.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is a great SCP, cute and charming with just a hint of creepiness. My only complaint is the lack of explanation for why it's always the other entity being transported to our universe/reality. I feel like there should be at least one test log where the D-class vanishes for a few hours.

It would also be funny if there was a test log where the entity keeps asking questions about our world, showing that the Foundation isn't the only organization investigating the website.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This was excellent, one of my favorite anomalous parody websites on the site!

item.title: Staff Post - Open
item.content:encoded: Rape comments (this doesn't even qualify as a joke in any sense) may fly on 4chan or whatever, but not here. Please don't make them.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: One would be teleported to the other I would assume.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: would tentical rape again?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Some people really do not get the difference no matter how much you try and explain it to them.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: [REDACTED]

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Brings back memories of Usenet's alt.sex.cthulhu newsgroup.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Why would it need to be? Both in and out of universe the question was asked before there was a 45th president.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Now that there's currently a 45th US president, should the question be updated to 46th?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: So what would happen if two D-class were ordered to make accounts on the site, find each other by username, and then select the "Meet" option?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I also would like this to be real so you are not alone.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I would as well.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Is it bad that i want this to be a real thing?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I just reread my post, and I'm not happy about my tone, so forgive me if I seemed rude. I would however say that coversate is at best non-standard English, and probably does not belong in formal scientific writing. Even if it does, its informality takes me out of the article. It's as bad, to me, as irregardless.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Actually, "conversate" is a word- it's just a rare, slightly regional one. It's like flammable and inflammable; while technically inflammable has a redundant prefix, it's still a valid form with the same meaning.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
If you can fix two grammar/syntax issues, I would upvote. "Conversate" is not a word. "Converse" is. Major pet peeve. And then there's this :

claiming that it was the "worst date it have ever had

It have? It had? I had? Not sure if this is deliberate, but it doesn't seem like it.

Otherwise, I love this. Weird, funny, believable.

item.title: Re: In which a hell hound fills out a dating profile
item.content:encoded: I'm sorry, but I simply have to point out that "I have the parts" is the best line I've read in a good, good while. If I could upvote your comment, I would.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was nothing short of heartwarming.

+1
Hurray.

item.title: Re: Commenting to come back to this later
item.content:encoded: I am cool with it.

item.title: Commenting to come back to this later
item.content:encoded: Although this seems like something I really would hate, I feel rather attached to it. This is very charming, though maybe a bit less Foundationy than I usually give a +1 to. I'd really like to come back to this at some point in the future after I've got some more experience under my belt and write a tale about 2115, if you're cool with it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: And on a second read a month later, I enjoyed this for what it is. Take that, past me!

item.title: Re: In which a hell hound fills out a dating profile
item.content:encoded: I know the feeling. :'(

item.title: Re: In which a hell hound fills out a dating profile
item.content:encoded: She doesn't move much.

item.title: Re: In which a hell hound fills out a dating profile
item.content:encoded: She seems really shy for a spaceborne, ancient protector of humanity.

item.title: Re: In which a hell hound fills out a dating profile
item.content:encoded:
[+] SCP-179, as suggested by Tagliafierro
Also, Fantem: Nah yer not.

1) PREFERRED LANGUAGE: current modern English should be fine I am done with French for the time

2) ARE YOU ABOVE YOUR CULTURE'S AGE OF CONSENT?

[X] Yes
[ ] No
[ ] My culture has no age of consent

3) REAL NAME: Sauel-Suesor Sedira Phoibe Ōhirume-no-muchi-no-kami Galatia Nira Servus Tenebris Lucy SCP-179

3.b) USERNAME: Phoibe-179

4) SPECIES: humanspawn with star blood and void flesh

4.b) PLACE OF ORIGIN: Cznunuodrev

5) ORGANIC:

[ ] Yes
[?] No

6) NUMBER OF PERSONALITIES (this also includes the number of souls within your host body): One

7) PLEASE SELECT THE ELEMENT ON WHICH YOUR METABOLISM IS BASED:

[ ] Carbon
[ ] Nitrogen
[ ] Selenium
[ ] Thoughts
[X] Other Neutron Matter solid organs combined with a fusion-molecule metabolism powered by the breath of my brother Sauel

8) NUMBER OF POISONOUS BODY PARTS (list all potentially toxic bodily fluids and gasses in this area): None

9) TYPE OF EXTREMITIES:

[ ] Claws
[ ] Tentacles
[X] Hands
[ ] Pincers
[ ] Antennae
[X] Other Hands Hands Hands Hands Hands Hands Hands
[ ] None

10) PHYSICAL HAZARDS (tick all that apply):

[ ] Radioactive
[ ] Acidic
[ ] Oxidising
[X] Other (Please specify: Gravity I weight a lot please find someone who cannot be broken And I can't move Someone fire and vacuum proof too)

11) DO YOU PREFER SPENDING TIME INDOORS OR OUTDOORS?

[ ] Indoors
[X] Outdoors
[ ] No Preference

12) ARE YOU SEEKING A RELATIONSHIP?

[?] Yes Maybe?
[ ] No

‡(please note the number of individuals you would like to enter a relationship with) ‡? One maybe?

23) DOES YOUR SPECIES ENJOY SEXUAL INTERCOURSE?

[?] Yes
[?] No
[?] Neutral

24) DOES SEXUAL INTERCOURSE WITHIN YOUR SPECIES LEADS TO ANY OF THE FOLLOWING:

[?] Death of one participant
[ ] Death of all participants
[?] Extreme pain to any participant
[?] Spawn
[ ] Murderous intent
[ ] Sudden promotion to queen/king/both of a large colony
[ ] The complete destruction of one or more ecosystems
[?] Other (Please specify: it would be my first I don't know? )

‡If sexual intercourse leads to personality change make a note of what this entails below:

⁂§X§⁂

25) EXISTENCE OF ADAPTIVE REPRODUCTIVE ORGANS: I have the parts

‡In this case, if sexual intercourse leads to a high chance of death from giving birth (painful or otherwise), note details below: __

Note: Form was not filled in its entirety, leaving points from 25 onwards empty. According to timestamps of the process, SCP-179 proceeded to adopt a fetal position, then a series of positions as depicted in the Kama Sutra for the female. SCP-179 stopped this compound movement (registered as the 590th recorded movement) after thirteen minutes of switching between positions, then attempted several possible obstetric positions to adopt during vaginal childbirth ("face up", both legs separated; "on a side"; squatting); it then proceeded to quickly adopt its stand-by position.

item.title: Re: In which a hell hound fills out a dating profile
item.content:encoded: You know what? My reply was dumb, please ignore.

item.title: In which a hell hound fills out a dating profile
item.content:encoded:
[+] So Freddie (SCP-1913-3) got a request to fill out this on tumblr
[-] I'm so sorry.

1) PREFERRED LANGUAGE: English

2) ARE YOU ABOVE YOUR CULTURE’S AGE OF CONSENT?

[ ] Yes
[ ] No
[✔] My culture has no age of consent

3) REAL NAME: Freddie Wolf

3.b) USERNAME: Fredanubis12

4) SPECIES: Artificem deum (lupus)

4.b) PLACE OF ORIGIN: Garden of Eden/Underworld

5) ORGANIC:

[✔] Yes
[ ] No

6) NUMBER OF PERSONALITIES (this also includes the number of souls within your host body):

I’m the one and only!

7) PLEASE SELECT THE ELEMENT ON WHICH YOUR METABOLISM IS BASED:

[✔] Carbon
[ ] Nitrogen
[ ] Selenium
[✔] Thoughts
[ ] Other

8) NUMBER OF POISONOUS BODY PARTS (list all potentially toxic bodily fluids and gasses in this area):

As little or as many as I’d need.

9) TYPE OF EXTREMITIES:

[✔] Claws
[✔] Tentacles
[✔] Hands
[✔] Pincers
[✔] Antennae
[✔] Other: (Really, anything I’d ever want or need. I can get or lose any of these at will, so do with that what you will.)
[✔] None

10) PHYSICAL HAZARDS (tick all that apply):

[ ] Radioactive
[ ] Acidic
[ ] Oxidising
[✔] Other (Please specify: Spontaneous combustion. Fire-proof lovers out there, you are beautiful!)

11) DO YOU PREFER SPENDING TIME INDOORS OR OUTDOORS?

[ ] Indoors
[ ] Outdoors
[✔] No Preference

12) ARE YOU SEEKING A RELATIONSHIP?

[✔] Yes
[ ] No

‡(please note the number of individuals you would like to enter a relationship with)

As many individuals that remain in under a single personality’s collective consciousness.

23) DOES YOUR SPECIES ENJOY SEXUAL INTERCOURSE?

[✔] Yes
[ ] No
[ ] Neutral

24) DOES SEXUAL INTERCOURSE WITHIN YOUR SPECIES LEADS TO ANY OF THE FOLLOWING:

[ ] Death of one participant
[ ] Death of all participants
[ ] Extreme pain to any participant
[ ] Spawn
[ ] Murderous intent
[ ] Sudden promotion to queen/king/both of a large colony
[ ] The complete destruction of one or more ecosystems
[✔] Other (Please specify: Basically nothing, it’s just an… intimate activity to my species. “Spawn” is made through an entirely different process… We’re basically made, not born.)

25) EXISTENCE OF ADAPTIVE REPRODUCTIVE ORGANS:

Yes

I am, by nature, adaptive. ▼>\\3\\0▼~♥

56) HOBBIES AND INTERESTS:

Yes

Cooking (You haven’t tasted anything till you’ve been treated to a slice of my shepherd’s pie), all physical art mediums, particularly metalworking, martial arts, hosting parties, leading revolts, and war/business strategy.

57) DO YOU HAVE ANY PETS?:

No

I’ve been playing the familiar gig for some time now, and the traveling was too much to get a pet. Though I’m very good with animals. Give me some time, and I could tame a lion.

58) DESCRIPTION:

Hey there! Name’s Freddie Wolf, though I’d prefer to be called either Freddie or just Mister Wolf. I’ve had a lot people just giving me names over the millennia, but I’d like to stick to my own. There’s so many names, even I’ve lost track of ‘em.

Looking for someone to get to know well. Someone who doesn’t mind playing rough. I love exercising, competitive fighting, drinking, food, and doing things with fire.

I’m a monogamous man, and respect my friendships above all else. I’m a go-getter; a self-made man. I work hard, play hard, and party even harder. I’m a bit of a homebody however, though I love going outside if it means spending time with the right company, and I'm great with kids.

I may come off as brash, scarily so at times, but deep down I’m a sensitive, small-town pup who only wants the best for his allies.

I’m a dreamer, I drink responsibly, and I treat my other right. Not looking for a short-term relationship; immortality does a number on those kinds of relationships.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was great. It held my interest the whole way through. +1

By the way, I feel kinda bad for 2115-1-97 :(

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Fixed the second point. As for the first, I guess that may be only a human problem.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This option is written in approximately ████████ languages. The other options do not appear once this one has been filled.

2 things.
First, imagine a list of ALL those languages. How in heck wold you find your language in so many lines? Seems like a huge exageration to me and highly useless.
Second, I think you mean that the other options don't appear until AFTER this one is filled. As in, once it knows what language you speak, it shows you the rest of the questions to fill, in your language.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's just too steeped in our present-day culture for me to believe that it really applies or would be understood by enough species to be particularly accessible. Which does leave open the possibility that there's something else going on, but it's not really explored.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is one of the few SCPs I wish I could upvote twice.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love to think charge parity is an option, after the time a dude fell in love with a gal from an antimatter universe.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I feexed.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"Containment procedures have been update accordingly"

You might wanna fix that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Too many of them showing up all at once. They're getting predictable.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It was sort of a collab, actually.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Pfffft, those are the best ones man. Laugh is indeed Fun, for instance.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Upvote.

However, I still retain the feeling that this is too similar to SCP-2703, especially considering that you're the author of it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I didn't know this was a rewrite. I just thought the original author had reposted it and improved on it. Either way, upvoted.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I would read twenty pages of testing logs involving all levels of personnel (under the lolfoundation hub if need be). Not all skips have to be dark and gloomy +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What, really? Those are my favourite skips!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Don't we already have an anomalous dating website? Maybe I'm thinking of the original version.

I dunno, I'm starting to get tired of the "anomalous thing what is something common 'cept it lets you meet a bunch of wacky aliens doing normal things" trope. No vote 'cuz this isn't really bad.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
‡(click »here« for a description of the difference between a pet and a slave)

That made me chuckle.

I like it. Its funny without it being too silly. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm laughing because my contaiment procedures was a whole novel and yours was a few sentences.

This is nice. Dont know if I'm allowed to upvote though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yay, you posted it! :D I really like what you've done with this, Tagliafierro. +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yay you revised it. I like this one much better. The form is awesome and I guess the last test subject had a baby with their date somehow? Odd but cool. At least that's what I gathered from the description.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The dots are the mouth(s).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Only issue I had was the footnote regarding what happens if you choose "culture has no age of consent". I would think most alien species wouldn't be able to form that facial expression/emoticon (:/ requires two eyes and a mouth, I'd assume some alien species wouldn't possess those), or if they could, that it might not mean the same thing in their culture. Nothing major, though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Shit! I just thought of something you could possibly add.

To parallel the fact that females on websites like this generally receive a lot more messages than males, you could reference something about a specific inter-dimensional species that gets a lot more attention than any others. Just a thought that I should've had earlier when I was reading the draft.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hoffentlich können wir es irgendwann verstehen

Wir gehen zur anderen Seite des Horizontes

Hoffentlich können wir es irgendwann verstehen

Wir gehen festen Schrittes

Rewrite of SCP-2115 by Smear_Gel, approved by djkaktus, Riemann and Roget in chat. Thanks to a lot of people like SoundChaser, Paroxysm, TrennerD and Cimmerian for reviewing this.
